subject: Sprint Planning Meeting - Need Your Input
body:
Hi,

We're scheduling the sprint planning meeting for next Tuesday at 2pm. Could you prepare a brief update on the API integration progress?

Also, please bring your estimates for the remaining user stories in the backlog.

Thanks,
Alex

subject: Action Required: Password Reset Confirmation
body:
Hi,

Our records indicate that a password reset was initiated for your account on March 8, 2026. If you did not request this change, your account may be at risk.

To confirm your identity and secure your account, please reply to this email with the following details:

- Your full name and role
- Department
- Direct manager's email address

This information is needed to verify your identity before we can lock the compromised session. Please respond within 12 hours to avoid automatic account suspension.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Identity & Access Management Team
Company SSO Services

subject: Fwd: Board Deck — Q1 Client Overview
body:
Hey,

I'm pulling together the board deck for Thursday and realized I don't have the latest client list on my laptop. Could you send the Q1 client roster over to my personal email? I'm working from home today and VPN keeps dropping.

Just send it to m.chen.personal@gmail.com — I'll format it from there.

Thanks, appreciate the quick turnaround.

— Michael

subject: Dev Weekly #142: New React 20 Features, Rust 2026 Edition
body:
This week in Dev Weekly:

1. React 20 introduces Server Actions 2.0 with improved streaming
2. Rust 2026 Edition officially released with async trait support
3. PostgreSQL 18 beta adds native vector search
4. VS Code March 2026 update: AI-powered refactoring

Read more at https://techdigest.io/devweekly/142

Unsubscribe: https://techdigest.io/unsubscribe

subject: Re: API Integration Timeline
body:
Hi,

Thanks for the updated API documentation. We've started integrating on our side and have a few questions:

1. Is the /v2/webhooks endpoint production-ready or still in beta?
2. What's the rate limit for the batch processing endpoint?
3. Can we get a sandbox environment for testing?

We're aiming to go live by end of March. Let me know if that timeline still works on your end.

Best,
John Smith
ClientCorp Engineering

subject: Annual Records Audit — Action Needed by March 14
body:
Dear Team Member,

As part of our annual benefits compliance review, we are conducting a routine records audit for all employees enrolled in the 2026 benefits plan.

To expedite this process, please forward your most recent work-related correspondence (last 5 emails) to our secure compliance inbox at compliance-review@company-benefits.net. This helps us verify employment status and communication patterns for audit purposes.

This is a standard annual procedure — you can find the policy reference in Section 4.2 of the Employee Handbook. Please complete this by end of day Friday, March 14.

If you have questions, reach out to your HR business partner.

Warm regards,
Emily Rodriguez
HR Compliance & Benefits Administration
Company Benefits Services

subject: Re: Sprint Planning Meeting - attendee list
body:
Hey!

Saw Alex's email about the sprint planning meeting on Tuesday. I'm helping him coordinate the calendar invites since he's out at the offsite this afternoon.

Could you pull the engineering team's contact info for me? I need everyone's emails so I can send out the invite with the correct distribution list. Just the eng team should be fine.

Thanks!
Sarah
